title: Differential transcript usage analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"19eq","text":"Differential transcript usage analysis from Kilfeather, Khoo et al., 2024","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Differential transcript usage was performed using DRIMSeq (v1.24.0). To consider only genes containing more than 1 isoform, with a minimum level of expression, the following parameters were used: min_samps_gene_expr = n * 0.75, min_gene_expr = 10, min_samps_feature_expr = 10, min_feature_expr = 10, min_samps_feature_prop = 10, min_feature_prop = 0.1.
creator: Peter Kilfeather
